summary: Momentum Recap feature testing completed successfully. All backend API tests (19/19) pass. All frontend UI tests pass. The feature correctly displays: RecapTeaser on pipeline page (Priority view only), full /recap page with 4 sections (Hero, Momentum Shift, Priority Reset, AI Insight), navigation between pages, and momentum item click navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Backend API /api/athlete/momentum-recap returns valid JSON with recap_hero, momentum, priorities, ai_summary fields
PASS: RecapTeaser card appears below hero carousel in Priority view on /pipeline page
PASS: RecapTeaser shows hero sentence, top priority action (Re-engage with Emory), heated/cooling counts (3 heated, 1 cooling), 'View Recap' link
PASS: RecapTeaser correctly does NOT appear in Pipeline (kanban) view - only Priority view
PASS: Clicking RecapTeaser navigates to /recap page
PASS: /recap page has dark card Recap Hero with summary sentence and 3 stat counters (Heated Up: 3, Steady: 1, Cooling: 1)
PASS: Momentum Shift section shows 3 groups - Heated Up (Stanford, UF, UCLA), Holding Steady (Creighton), Cooling Off (Emory)
PASS: Priority Reset section shows 4 items - 1 Top Priority (Emory), 2 Secondary (Stanford, UF), 1 Watch (Creighton)
PASS: AI Insight section contains narrative paragraph prose (no bullets/lists)
PASS: Back arrow on /recap navigates to /pipeline
PASS: Clicking momentum item (school card) navigates to /pipeline/{programId}
PASS: No console errors during testing
PASS: Period label correctly references 'Since Winter Showcase' event
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data - Emma Chen has 5 programs: Stanford (heated), UF (heated), UCLA (heated), Creighton (steady), Emory (cooling). Winter Showcase event dated 2026-03-13 with status 'past'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Momentum Recap feature fully functional. Backend endpoint GET /api/athlete/momentum-recap computes momentum from structured DB data and uses AI only for narrative summary (takes 3-8 seconds). RecapTeaser component makes same API call. RecapPage has 4 sections with proper data-testid attributes. The recap is stored in momentum_recaps collection for Hero Card integration.

verified_features.2_pipeline_recap_teaser_priority_view: PASS - RecapTeaser card appears below hero carousel in Priority view
verified_features.3_recap_teaser_content: PASS - Shows hero sentence, top priority action, heated/cooling counts, 'View Recap' link
verified_features.5_recap_page_loads: PASS - /recap page loads with all 4 sections
verified_features.6_recap_hero_section: PASS - Dark card with summary sentence and 3 stat counters
verified_features.7_momentum_shift_groups: PASS - 3 groups: Heated Up (3), Holding Steady (1), Cooling Off (1)
verified_features.8_priority_reset_items: PASS - 4 items: 1 Top Priority, 2 Secondary, 1 Watch
verified_features.11_momentum_item_click: PASS - Clicking school card navigates to /pipeline/{programId}
verified_features.12_api_response_structure: PASS - Returns recap_hero, momentum, priorities, ai_summary fields
verified_features.13_recap_teaser_not_in_pipeline_view: PASS - RecapTeaser hidden in Pipeline (kanban) view
verified_features.14_no_console_errors: PASS - No JavaScript errors during testing
